keywordGapSubtitle: Find mots-clés your concurrents rank for that you don't
keywordGapNoCompetitors: Aucun concurrent ajouté pour le moment
keywordGapNoCompetitorsHint: Ajouter concurrents to discover mot-clé opportunities
keywordGapSelectPrompt: Select a concurrent to view mot-clé gaps
keywordGapBulkActions: Bulk actions will be available soon
overlapEmpty: Ajouter concurrents and monitor mots-clés to see overlap data
contentGapNoCompetitors: Aucun concurrent ajouté pour le moment
tooltipPriorityDesc: Overall priorité based on opportunity score and search volume
tooltipScoreDesc: Opportunity score (0-100) combining volume, difficulté, and concurrent position
tooltipEstTrafficDesc: Estimated monthly trafic you could capture by ranking for this mot-clé
tooltipDifficultyDesc: How hard it is to rank for this mot-clé (0-100)
reportsGenerateAll: Generate Reports for Tous les mots-clés
reportTooltipKeywordDesc: The mot-clé phrase analyzed in the report
reportTooltipStatusDesc: Current processing status of the report
reportTooltipAvgPosDesc: Moyen SERP position across top results
reportTooltipTopUrlDesc: The highest ranking URL for this mot-clé
contentAnalysisSubtitle: Compare on-page SEO metrics with concurrent pages
competitorMgmtNoCompetitors: Aucun concurrent ajouté pour le moment
removeCompetitorConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this concurrent? It will be hidden from tracking.
removeCompetitorsConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {count} concurrent(s)?
contentGapSectionSubtitle: Identify mot-clé opportunities where concurrents rank but you don't
contentGapSectionTooltip: Contenu gap analysis compares your mot-clé rankings with concurrents to find opportunities you're missing.
competitorOverviewNoCompetitors: Aucun concurrent ajouté pour le moment
competitorOverviewNoCompetitorsHint: Ajouter concurrents to compare rankings over time
competitorOverviewNoDataHint: Check concurrent positions to populate the chart
gapTrendsEmpty: Non trend data yet. Run content gap analysis to start tracking.
addCompetitorSubtitle: Discover concurrents from your data or add one manually
addCompetitorSerpDesc: Domaines that rank for your monitored mots-clés.
addCompetitorSerpEmpty: Non concurrents found in SERP data yet
addCompetitorSerpEmptyHint: Monitor more mots-clés to discover concurrents
addCompetitorSuggestDesc: Domaines that compete for the same organic mots-clés as you.
addCompetitorManualDesc: Enter a concurrent domaine to add it directly.
addCompetitorManualDomainNote: Enter the domaine without http:// or www.
contentGapDetailScoreBreakdownDesc: The opportunity score (0-100) is calculated from three factors: search volume potential, mot-clé difficulté, and concurrent ranking position.
contentGapDetailVolumeDesc: Based on {volume} recherches mensuelles. Higher volume = more points (up to 50).
contentGapDetailDifficultyDesc: Difficulté is {difficulty}/100 ({label}). Lower difficulté = more points.
contentGapDetailWhoRanksDesc: Shows which concurrent currently ranks for this mot-clé, their position, and the specific URL that ranks.
contentGapDetailNoRankingDesc: You currently have no ranking for this mot-clé. This is a pure content gap — creating a dedicated page could capture this trafic.
contentGapDetailWhatToDoDesc: Actionable recommendations based on mot-clé difficulté, search volume, concurrent position, and your current ranking status.
recEasyWinDesc: Faible difficulté mot-clé — create a well-optimized page targeting this phrase. With quality content and basic on-page SEO, you can rank relatively quickly.
recModerateEffortDesc: Moyen difficulté — build comprehensive, in-depth content with strong internal linking. Consider creating a pillar page covering this topic thoroughly.
recHighCompetitionDesc: Difficult mot-clé — build topical authority first by targeting related easier mots-clés. Then create pillar content backed by quality backlinks.
recHighValueTargetDesc: Your concurrent ranks in the top 3 for this high-volume mot-clé. Study their content structure, word count, and backlink profile to create something better.
recSignificantTrafficDesc: Élevé search volume mot-clé. Even ranking in positions 5-10 could drive substantial organic trafic to your site.
recCreateNewContentDesc: You have no rankings for this mot-clé yet. Create a dedicated, optimized page targeting this specific topic and search intent.
recImproveExistingDesc: You currently rank at position {position}. Update and improve your existing page — add more depth, better structure, and relevant internal links.
recQuickContentPieceDesc: Faible volume but very easy to rank for. Bon for building topical coverage and internal linking structure.
generateReportConfirmation: This will run all analyses and collect data into a downloadable PDF:
generateReportStepBacklinks: Run concurrent backlink analysis (if data is stale)
generateReportStepContentGaps: Analyze lacunes de contenu with concurrents
generateReportStepCollect: Collect all metrics into a downloadable PDF
generateReportFreshDataNote: Fresh data (less than 24h old) will be reused. This may take a few minutes.
reportProfileQuickDesc: Executive summary with health score and key metrics
reportProfileStandardDesc: Core analysis: mots-clés, backlinks, and lacunes de contenu
reportEditorDragHint: Drag sections to reorder, toggle to include/exclude
gapSummaryTotalGapsTooltip: Total mots-clés where at least one concurrent ranks but you don't. More gaps = more untapped opportunities.
gapSummaryHighPriorityTooltip: Gaps scored 70+ sur 100, indicating high search volume, low difficulté, or concurrent ranking in top positions. Best opportunities to pursue first.
gapSummaryEstTrafficTooltip: Estimated visites mensuelles you could gain by ranking for all gap mots-clés. Calculated assuming ~30% click-through rate for top positions.
gapSummaryCompetitorsTooltip: Number of unique concurrent domaines analyzed in the content gap comparison.
gapComparisonTooltip: Compares how many lacunes de contenu each concurrent contributes. Concurrents with many high-priorité gaps likely target topics you are missing entirely.
overlapSummary: {totalKeywords} mots-clés across {competitorCount} concurrent(s) · You rank for {youRanking}
overlapNoMatchHint: Essayez d'ajuster votre recherche ou vos filtres.
contentGapNoCompetitorsHint: Ajouter concurrents to discover content gap opportunities
contentGapDescription: Mots-clés where concurrents rank but you don't. Higher scores indicate easier wins with more trafic potential.
contentGapNoOpportunitiesHint: Run content gap analysis to find opportunities
tooltipKeywordDesc: The search phrase that represents this content gap opportunity.
tooltipCompetitorDesc: The concurrent domaine that currently ranks for this mot-clé.
tooltipScoreFullDesc: Weighted score (0-100): search volume (up to 50pts) + difficulté bonus (up to 50pts) + position bonus (+20 for top 3, +10 for top 10). Higher is better.
tooltipVolumeDesc: Moyen monthly search volume for this mot-clé. Higher volume means more potential trafic.
tooltipDifficultyFullDesc: Mot-clé difficulté score (0-100). Lower values indicate easier mots-clés to rank for. Based on backlink profiles of current top results.
tooltipCompPosDesc: The position where the concurrent currently ranks for this mot-clé in search results.
tooltipStatusFullDesc: Identifié = newly found, Surveillance = being tracked, Ranking = you now rank, Rejeté = not relevant.
tooltipPriorityFullDesc: Automatically assigned based on opportunity score: Élevé (70+), Moyen (40-69), Faible (below 40).
reportsEmptyDesc: Create reports from mot-clé surveillance to analyze concurrent content strategies and get actionable recommendations.
reportsTooltipKeyword: The target mot-clé this analysis was created for
reportsTooltipStatus: En attente (queued), Analyzing (in progress), Terminé (done), Échoué (error)
reportsTooltipCompetitors: Number of concurrent pages analyzed for this mot-clé
reportsTooltipAvgWords: Moyen word count across analyzed concurrent pages
reportsTooltipAvgH2: Moyen number of H2 headings used by concurrent pages
reportsTooltipAvgImages: Moyen number of images used by concurrent pages
contentAnalysisNoCompetitorsHint: Ajouter concurrents above to analyze their page content
contentAnalysisNoDataHint: Click "Analyze Page" to fetch concurrent page analysis
contentAnalysisSelectPrompt: Select a concurrent and mot-clé to view content analysis
contentAnalysisNotRanking: Non classé or no analysis available
contentAnalysisInsightWordsAdd: Consider adding {count} more words to match concurrent depth
contentAnalysisInsightH2Add: Ajouter {count} more H2 headings for better structure
contentAnalysisPageAnalysisStarted: Page analysis started — results will appear shortly
recIncreaseContentDesc: Concurrents average {avgWords} words. {gap, select, positive {Add ~{gapWords} more words.} other {Your content is shorter.}}
recIncreaseContentStep1: Expand existing sections with more detail
recImproveHeadingsDesc: Concurrents use an average of {count} H2 headings. Ajouter more section headings.
recImproveHeadingsStep1: Break content into clear sections with H2 tags
recAddImagesDesc: Concurrents use an average of {count} images. Visual content improves engagement.
recAddImagesStep1: Ajouter relevant images to each section
recAddImagesStep2: Use alt text with target mots-clés
recBuildBacklinksDesc: Analyze where concurrents get their backlinks and target similar sources.
recBuildBacklinksStep1: Review concurrent backlink sources in report
recBuildBacklinksStep2: Reach out to top domaines référents
createReportSelectHint: Select 1-3 concurrents from SERP to analyze what makes them rank well
createReportFetchSerpFirst: Fetch SERP data for this mot-clé first
clickToDiscoverCompetitors: Click below to discover your organic search concurrents
positionScatterDescription: Your position vs concurrent position per mot-clé. Points below the diagonal = you rank better.
backlinkRadarDescription: Normalized backlink metrics comparison across your domaine and concurrents (0-100 scale).
backlinkQualityDescription: Backlinks grouped by referring domaine rank tier (DR).
keywordBarsDescription: Position comparison for your highest-volume mots-clés. Lower position number = better ranking.
contentGapBubbleDescription: Gap mots-clés plotted by difficulté vs search volume. Bubble size = concurrents ranking. Color = opportunity score.
winRateDescription: Mot-clé ranking wins, ties, and losses vs each concurrent.
